feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Migrating from ECC Org Structure (PPOMA/PPOME) to S/4HANA Teams & Responsibilities
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently working on a 1:1 migration project where we want to move our organizational structure from an ECC system (maintained via PPOMA/PPOME) over to the new Teams and Responsibilities approach in SAP S/4HANA (Fiori-based Flexible Workflow).

Goal: We need to replicate the existing org data—positions, relationships, cost center ownership, and approval responsibilities—so that we can leverage the Manage Teams and Responsibilities app in S/4HANA for Flexible Workflows.
Scale: It’s a large organizational structure, so manually recreating it is impractical.

1. Has anyone successfully performed an automated migration from PPOMA/PPOME (e.g., HRP1000/HRP1001 tables) into the new Teams & Responsibilities or Business Partner model used by S/4HANA Flexible Workflow?

2. Are there any SAP standard tools such as SAP Data Services, Legacy Transfer Migration Cockpit (LTMC), or Migration Cockpit that directly support migrating Org Management (OM) objects to Teams & Responsibilities?

3. If no standard solution is available, would a custom ABAP extractor or program (reading from PPOMA/PPOME tables) and Fiori OData APIs be the recommended approach to bulk-load the data into S/4HANA?

4. Any best practices or gotchas for preserving existing approval rules (e.g., PFAC responsibilities, KMDIMS, budget limits) so that they seamlessly transition to Flexible Workflow?

We’re aiming for as “1-to-1” a solution as possible. We recognize that there might need to be some re-mapping in S/4HANA, but if you have any experiences or guidance on how to minimize manual process, I’d greatly appreciate it.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: disp-work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , ,10102
entry.content:
Can someone pls help me with the analyzation of this.

Database and Applicationserver are on the same host. OS is SUSE Linux.

I added the files dev_disp and dev_w0 to this post. My Server worked last week without any issues.

entry.title: Adding Lean Service component in the maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I have configured lean services in the system, I can add it in a maintenance order for an operation. However, when I want to add it in the maintenance task list I cannot see the Item categories which were configured.

Can someone explain what could be the reason for this or am I missing something here?

Screenshots for reference:

1. Procurement mode is set to "Enhanced procurement mode" for my plant-order type combination.

2. PM/CS -> Maintenance and Service Processing -> Subcontracting for MRO process -> Define Item Categories

3. Configured Item categories not appearing in the "Services" Tab for Maintenance Tasklist:

4. But they are available in maintenance order operation

 

Is there something else I have to configure to get them in maintenance tasklist?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Creating a Contact Person from Supplier CR UI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question, can anyone tell me how the system understands which account group to consider when we create a Contact Person from a Supplier Master MDG CR UI? I believe we do not get to choose any Account Group of the Contact person to be created when we are inside the Supplier Master CR UI. I would like to know if there is any mapping of account groups (between main Supplier and Contact person) exists in regards to this mapping in SPRO.

My requirement is to create Contact persons with different Account Groups for different Suppliers(having different Account Groups).

Any reply would be much appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to tackle code adaptations for S/4HANA for IS-Health components?
entry.content:
Hi All!

I'm well aware that my question is rather wide but this is due to the "simplification" item for IS-Health impacting various different object types. I became aware about this fun item way back in 2019 when I ran a first S/4HANA readiness check on our systems. Some of the items flagged in our Z-code are fairly easy to correct but for some others, I'm not quite sure what an alternative in S/4HANA could be.

My hope is, that some of you have already gone through this "exercise" and can suggest some fixes we could apply in our code. I'm especially interested in these issues:

No longer available message classes --> "copy" to Z-messages or using another SAP-provided message class saying the same thing (but hopefully in a very basic class)? We use at least these messages:

  • MESSAGE i179(n8). "There is no data for your selection
  • MESSAGE s064(nf) WITH sy-subrc 'LT01'. "Error & while calling transaction &
  • MESSAGE e115(n2) WITH wa_kna1-kunnr. "Customer & was changed
  • MESSAGE s259(n1me). "Material document & & posted

No longer available function modules --> are there other SAP-routines we could use or should we copy the code to Z-function group / modules or perhaps put the needed logic directly in the affect code if there not many hits and the code is short & straightforward?

  • ISH_BAPIRET2_DISPLAY
  • ISH_POPUP_TO_CONFIRM_SIMPLE
  • FORMAT_DATE_4_OUTPUT

No longer available Memory IDs --> I'm not really familiar with these, which doesn't help with deciding how best to correct the impacted code! Any suggestions of whether creating Z-Memory-IDs is an option or if something completely different has to be used in its stead?

  • FIL
  • ANZ

Any takers?

Thanks much and Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: we Created ZML81N tcode for Service entry sheet while doing SES getting error Enter Plant plz prov s
entry.content:
I am created Z tcode for SER (Service Entry sheet )  ZML81N while run this t code i am getting error Enter Plant while saving what should i do help me out. 

Enter Plant

Message No. M7018

entry.title: Released RAP BO/CDS views/class for reading and updating material class/characteristics
entry.content:
Hi,

We are searching for any released RAP BO/CDS views/class for reading and updating material class/characteristics. Basically anything that reads and updates the following standard tables in SAP: AUSP/CABN/KLAH/KSML.

Currently, we are using this BAPIs in our old ECC system.

BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE
BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE_KEY
BAPI_OBJCL_CREATE
BAPI_OBJCL_GET_KEY_OF_OBJECT
BAPI_OBJCL_GETCLASSES_KEY
BAPI_OBJCL_GETDETAIL_KEY

We are aware that there may be web APIs for this purpose (e.g., API_CLFN_CHARACTERISTIC, API_CLFN_CLASS) but we are wondering if there is any released objects from SAP to achieve clean core approach (i.e, Tier 1).

entry.title: S/4HANA Subcontracting with MRP Area: material reservation not reduced
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm seeking your support to understand the correct procedure for sending components to a subcontractor within a Subcontracting flow with MRP Areas in an S/4Hana environment.

According to the configuration, sinse I don't have any stock in the MRP Area, MRP Live MD01N creates transfer requirements from the plant to the MRP Area in order to supply the MRP Area.

The issue is that when I send the materials to the subcontractor using the standard transactions (ME2O, ME2ON or ADSUBCON), the quantities of the transfer requirements are not reduced accordingly.

Those TrnRes quantities aren't updated from my mov. 541 perfomed by ME2ON, but only at the next run of the MRP LIVE.

This creates problems in both the stock Overview (MD04) of the sending plant and the MRP Area, until the next run of the MRP Live.

Do I have the wrong expectations or is there something wrong with the process?"

Let me know if you need some other details.

@Caetano I hope for your answer.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA On-Premise complying with FDA Tittle 21 CFR?
entry.content: Where can I find a document that SAP S/4 HANA On-Premise complying with FDA Tittle 21 CFR? In the past SAP provides such documents for R/3, mySAP, etc.

entry.title: WB2R_SC - Settlement document that reduces business volume
entry.content:
Hi All, 

in the Sales rebates scenario in S/4 Hana we configured different types of sales rebates condition contract types with different types of settlement documents (credit note, debit note etc).

The requirement of my client is that a particular type of settlement document related to a specific contract type has to reduce the business volume visible in WB2R_BUSVOL, as in the case of credit memos generated from VF01 TCODE.

Is there some settings in customizing in order to drive this behaviour in the settlement document?

Thanks for your answer

entry.title: Enable Hierarchy for plant field I_JournalEntryItemCube CDS view
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to create custom analytical query I_JournalEntryItemCube and we want to enable hierarchy for plant field which is not available currently

Can you please  let me know the option how to enable the hierarchy for plant field which is not exist as apart of standard.

Thanks

Kishore

entry.title: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
Hi,

i have got a functionality that at some point in time also updates the material master using MODIFY ENTITY ... UPDATE on I_ProductTP_2. 

I want to get that functionality under automated test, but I don't seem to be able to actually mock the data in a way that it can be updated.

This is what I've done:

 

METHOD class_setup.
 sql_test_environment = cl_osql_test_environment=>create( i_dependency_list = VALUE #( ( 'I_ProductTP_2' ) ) ).
ENDMETHOD.
METHOD my_test.
 TYPES tty_product_ids_wr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF I_ProductTP_2 WITH DEFAULT KEY.
 sql_test_environment->insert_test_data( i_data = VALUE tty_product_ids_wr( ( Product = '990000000000000001' ) ) ).
 sql_test_environment->insert_test_data( i_data = VALUE tty_product_ids_wr( ( Product = '990000000000000002' ) ) ).
ENDMETHOD.

 

So If I now SELECT from I_ProductTP_2, then my inserted products are perfectly there, but if I run the following, I get a "404 not found" error:

 

MODIFY ENTITY I_ProductTP_2
  UPDATE FIELDS ( ProductOldID )
  WITH VALUE #( ( %key-Product       = '990000000000000001'
                  %data-ProductOldID = '990000000000000002' ) )
  FAILED FINAL(failed) ##NEEDED
  REPORTED FINAL(reported) ##NEEDED.

 

So: what am I doing wrong here? If I try to use the CDS-Test-Environment for I_ProductTP_2 the test crashes because one of the underlying CDSes if I_ProductTP_2 must not be used with the CDS-Test-Environment for some unexplained reason.

To me this looks pretty broken on SAP-side, but maybe I am just missing out something here?

entry.title: BKPF-BSTAT - document status O and W - meaning
entry.content:
Hi ,

Does anybody know the meaning of Document Status O and Document Status W ?

You can see it for example in FB03 doc, in the Header icon or in BKPF table (Doc Status).

What exactly does each status O and W mean ?

Any help is welcome

Regards

entry.title: SAP GUI及びSAP RouterのWin11 OS対応の確認
entry.content:
There is a plan to update the operating system of the client PC from Win10 to Win11 in the future.

Are the SAP GUI Ver.800 and SAP Router Ver.7.53 patch 422 supported  in Win11 OS?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to change the year in number ranges with nr status
entry.content: I am trying to change the year using Tcode: fbn1 but the system does not recognize it. How to overcome this problem.

entry.title: Vendor Novation in SAP S/4HANA Public Sector Management
entry.content:
Dear Experts, I am looking for information on the SAP Best Practice for supporting a vendor novation in the S/4HANA Public Sector environment. With SAP SRM sundowning in 2027, when a customer is using S/4HANA and Public Sector Management, what is the best practice for handling vendor novations when there are existing contracts and purchase orders in place, specifically when the commitments cover multiple years. For example, a contract and related purchase orders are created in a given fiscal year, let's assume FY23 with Vendor A, and then in FY24, Vendor A is acquired and merged with Vendor B. How should the public sector customer handle this novation? How should the existing contract with Vendor A and now Vendor B be updated? How would the associated purchase orders under this contract be updated for Vendor B while still reflecting the budgeting as applied in FY23?

Is there a best practice for S/4HANA to support closing the previous purchase orders and opening new purchase orders that still reflect the budget period of FY23 but using the new Vendor B that can be reflected against the updated contract with Vendor B that was originally with Vendor A?

Could this be accomplished using the Financial Management (FM) Multi-Year Budget Execution or is there a different or better option for handling the vendor novation?

Thank you!

entry.title: Consumer Proxy to connect to the external SOAP Service Via API key in S4 HANA
entry.content:
We are looking to consume a SOAP service using API key from S4 HANA.

We want to use the Consumer Proxy to connect to the external SOAP Service.

When setting up the logical port in SOAManager, there is no option to use API Key.

Is there a way to connect to a SOAP service from S4 HANA using Consumer Proxy and using API key for authentication.

entry.title: Output type WCOCO
entry.content:
Hi all, 

the requirement of my client is that when It is saved from WCOCO a condition contract for sales rebates It should be triggered an output print with the detail of all the data entered in the CCM both at header and Item level.

In WCOCO I don't see any option for the message determination, how can I trigger a print?

Thanks for your reply!

entry.title: EML: Read All Instances of a BO
entry.content:
In an ABAP RAP project, I want to read all instances of a BusinessObject via the EML statement "READ ..." like

READ ENTITIES OF zstore IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY store
ALL FIELDS
WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT result_stores.

but without providing any key, since I want to read all instances.

So, basically, I want to do a query "SELECT * FROM mytable" but as an EML statement for a BusinessObject.

Is that possible, and if so, how?

entry.title: API_PROJECT_V3(Create multiple WBS nodes and Get Next Available Project Number)
entry.content:
Hello community. 

I'm trying to create a PS Project(CJ20N) using the API_PROJECT_V3 from Integration Suite and I'm having two problems which I'm not sure what's the best way to solve. 

When I'm going to create the Project, the sending system gives me an existing Project Number so I can use as template, with this Number I also should get the next available number and create it, on S4 I can use the FM CN_SUCHE_FREIE_NUMMER to do that, but it's not an RFC and I didn't find any API to get that number. Is there any way I didn't find or should I create a wrapper for this FM?

My other problem is that I'm trying to copy the WBS structure from the template project into the new one. For that I first read the old Project and then use its data on the POST function. But on the Help Portal I don't find any field to make the link between children and parent WBS nodes. I think I can use WBSElementParentInternalID even though it's not documented on the CREATE structure, but I'm not sure how to fill it since when creating I still don't have the Internal ID

Thanks in advance
